prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Blades in the Dark inspired gaslamp fantasy setting. Terrain type: diverse_archipelago. Draw many irregular island chains and scattered landmasses across a haunted Void Sea, unevenly distributed with strong variation in size and shape. Industrial gothic / gaslamp fantasy cartography: perpetual supernatural darkness, smog, fog, blue electroplasmic lightning towers, flickering gas lamps, leviathan-blood refineries, lightning rail bridges, canal districts, dockyards, factories, criminal faction territories, occult ruins, ghost-lit sectors, and deathland outposts. Islands vary widely: walled canal city-islands, smuggler coves, prison hulks, leviathan hunter ports, haunted lighthouse rocks, refinery isles, dead ash atolls, drowned forest islands, fungal wetland islands, jagged mountain islands, noble estate islands, Bluecoat fortress islands, and abandoned dock-forts. Include many biomes under supernatural darkness: rain-soaked coasts, salt marshes, ash wastes, toxic industrial barrens, cold moors, black reefs, storm cliffs, swamp deltas, and pale ghost fields. Every major island has realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, lagoons, barrier islands, reefs, shoals, and sea caves. Soot-black parchment atlas, blue ghostlight glow, ornate gothic border, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
